name: Roasted Chestnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Make two shallow slashes on the flat side of each chestnut using a small knife.
3. Place the chestnuts in a single layer on a baking sheet and bake for 4-5 minutes, turning them once halfway through the cooking time.
4. Carefully peel the chestnuts with a small, sharp knife, being cautious not to burn your fingers.
5. Enjoy the chestnuts while they are still hot, as this is when they taste best. You may experience minor burns on your fingers if you consume them at this stage.
